/opt/homebrew/bin/aarch64-elf-ar qc ../../libviperwidget.a CMakeFiles/viperwidget.dir/src/widget.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/viperwidget.dir/src/button.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/viperwidget.dir/src/label.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/viperwidget.dir/src/textbox.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/viperwidget.dir/src/checkbox.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/viperwidget.dir/src/listview.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/viperwidget.dir/src/treeview.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/viperwidget.dir/src/menu.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/viperwidget.dir/src/layout.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/viperwidget.dir/src/progressbar.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/viperwidget.dir/src/scrollbar.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/viperwidget.dir/src/draw3d.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/viperwidget.dir/src/dialog.cpp.obj
/opt/homebrew/bin/aarch64-elf-ranlib ../../libviperwidget.a
